name: Cheesy Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE ASPARAGUS AND WATER IN 1 QT. GLASS CASSEROLE DISH.
M.W. ON HIGH FOR 8 TO 10 MINUTES OR UNTIL TENDER. STIR ONCE, DRAIN AND SET ASIDE.
2. MELT 1 TB OF BUTTER AND MIX IN BREAD CRUMBS AND CASHEW NUTS. SET ASIDE.
3. MELT REMAINING BUTTER ON HIGH FOR 30 TO 60 SECONDS.
STIR IN FLOUR AND SEASONING. BLEND IN MILK.
COOK ON HIGH FOR 3 TO 5 MINUTES OR UNTIL THICKENED AND BUBBLY,
STIRRING AFTER 2 MINUTES AND THEN EVERY MINUTE.
4. REMOVE HALF OF THE ASPARAGUS FROM THE CASSEROLE DISH.
SPREAD REMAINING ASPARAGUS EVENLY OVER BOTTOM OF CASSEROLE.
TOP WITH HALF OF THE SAUCE AND HALF OF THE CHEESE.
5. POUR IN REMAINING ASPARAGUS AND TOP WITH SAUCE THEN CHEESE.
COOK ON HIGH FOR 1 OR 2 MINUTES OR UNTIL HOT.
ROTATE AT HALF TIME IF NO TURNTABLE.
